MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff April Mainardi's Motion to remove case from Judicial Arbitration and for referral to Private mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for Jury Trial on 12/3/2012 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice, Proceedings not reported. (610)
